content.en:
Soon.

Proz came to the Eagle Department and congratulated Ye Tian on breaking through to the peak ancient demon level realm.

"Congratulations to the Heavenly Ancient Demon!"

Proz congratulated.

"Hahaha, the ancient demon of Pleuz is polite!"

Ye Tiandao.

In the past, he called Proz Lord Proz, but now it is naturally not suitable, in terms of realm, he is the same as Proz, and in terms of strength, he can kill Proz in seconds.

So, he just called the Pleuz Ancient Demon.

After that, there were other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses to congratulate, all of them were some peak-level ancient demon-level powerhouses who knew Ye Tian.

Maybe the relationship was average before, but now that Ye Tian has broken through, the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of these tribes naturally want to have a good relationship with Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian also entertained these peak ancient demon-level powerhouses and held a simple banquet.

Not long after, these peak ancient demon-level powerhouses left one after another.

And as Ye Tian broke through to the peak Ancient Demon Level realm, his reputation in the 14 Aromu Abyss was completely loud, and he was well known by countless emperor-level and Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

For Ye Tian, the peak Ancient Demon Level Realm was just the beginning, he first had to raise his cultivation to the limit of the Peak Ancient Demon Level Realm, and then find a way to increase the success rate of impacting the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm.

Of course, he had already condensed the Extreme Dao Life Pattern, comprehended the Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules, integrated them into his own Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules, and created the Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcane, and there was more than one.

In fact, if he hits the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm, the success rate must be far higher than that of others, but it is still not safe.

If the breakthrough fails, all of his copied bodies will probably fall, so he must be careful.

Of course.

This is a projection of the past time and space, maybe he failed and fell, and he just returned to his own era, but he also wanted to break through to the ultimate ancient demon level realm in this era, so as to learn more secrets and knowledge, so that he could get more benefits by returning to his own era.

......

Time flies.

Another relatively long period of time has passed, and on this day, the Eagle Department finally gave birth to an ancient demon-level powerhouse, which is the rising star of the Eagle Department - Lu River!

He is the son of an elder of the Eagle Ministry, born after the rise of the Eagle Ministry, with sufficient resources and high talent, he has cultivated all the way to the top emperor level.

Not long ago, Xiao He hit the ancient demon level, successfully broke through, and became the second ancient demon level powerhouse in the Eagle Department.

This is undoubtedly a great joy for the Eagle Department.

After all, the Eagle Department has always been an ancient demon-level powerhouse in Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian is strong, the Eagle Department is still just an ordinary tribe in the eyes of the outside world.

But now, the Eagle Department has begun to give birth to ancient demon-level powerhouses, and this is a good start.

......

"I've seen the Ancient Demon of the Heavens!"

After breaking through the Ancient Demon Level, he came to visit the Ancient Demon Ye Tian of the Heavens in the clan.

At this moment, Ye Tian looked at the river and brought a terrifying suppression to the river.

He had always known that Ye Tian was extremely powerful, but he had never had a concept, but he had already broken through to the realm of the ancient demon level, and he felt that Ye Tian's breath could kill him.

That's a big gap!

"Xiao He, you are very good, breaking through to the ancient demon level, but the ordinary ancient demon level is just the beginning. Ye Tian said.

Immediately, he gave Wei He a inheritance, and with the inheritance, Xiao He could practice faster.

After receiving the inheritance, Lu He said gratefully, "Thank you Lord Heavenly Ancient Demon!"

"Go and cultivate, don't bother me if it's okay!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes!"

The river should be answered.

......

And after the breakthrough of the river to the ancient demon level, the eagle department completely broke out in a breakthrough frenzy, and many top emperors began to choose to impact the ancient demon level.

However, the near-third rank fell.

But after a long period of time, the Eagle Department had given birth to sixteen Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and this terrifying number had surpassed that of many top tribes.

The number of ancient demon-level powerhouses like the Golden God Department and the Dragon Disciple Tribe is no longer as good as that of the Eagle Department, and the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses are not as strong as Ye Tian.

There are many ancient demon-level powerhouses in the Eagle Tribe, and the clansmen of the Eagle Tribes are also extremely proud, and few people dare to offend the clansmen of the Eagle Tribe.

In the past, although Ye Tian was extremely powerful, because he was too low-key, the weak tribe did not know about Ye Tian's existence at all.

But now it's different, the Eagle Department has more than a dozen Ancient Demon Levels, even if you don't know Ye Tian, you also know that the Eagle Department has more than a dozen Ancient Demon Levels, where do you dare to provoke it!

......

Endless spaceline.

this day.

Ye Tian actually found an ownerless space-time bubble, the reason why it was determined that there was no owner, was that the owner-owned space-time bubble had been transformed, and it was forbidden to snoop.

And this ownerless space-time bubble has not been transformed, and a little observation will reveal it.

After that, he even entered the bubble of this ownerless plane, and was 100% sure that it was ownerless.

"Ownerless space-time bubbles are rare!" Ye Tian said darkly.

If an Ultimate Ancient Demon discovers here, he will completely transform it and secretly cultivate his clansmen, thus cultivating the three hundred and sixty-six main divisions.

Of course.

If you don't have the strength of the ultimate ancient demon, there is no way to transform here, and the environment here is not suitable for ordinary creatures to survive, there is no 013 method to cultivate the three hundred and sixty-six main parts.

"Mark it, if I break through to the ultimate ancient demon realm, I will use this as the main territory of the Eagle Department and move the Eagle Department here. "

Ye Tian muttered. []

Then, he marked the place for a moment, and then began to scrape the resources again.

However, the links here are very bad, and there are not many resources born, but for him, these resources are already a lot.

Originally, his resources were exhausted when he broke through to the peak ancient demon level realm, but now his net worth has skyrocketed again.

After a period of time, Ye Tian took away all the precious resources in this ownerless space-time bubble, and then let this replica body stay here for cultivation, and then copied another replica body, and let another replica body explore the endless space-time line.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

And after that, Ye Tian had nothing to gain in the endless space-time line.

After all, those Ultimate Ancient Demons have explored the endless time and space line from time to time, and have explored endless years, and there are really good things that have been looted away by them.

This time, Ye Tian was able to discover this ownerless space-time bubble, which was also lucky, and it was estimated that it would not take too long for this space-time bubble to be born.

Otherwise, he wouldn't have been able to find it.
